summary: Iteration 3 (RLIQ rename + EdPuzzle-style QuizPlayer) FULL E2E PASS. Backend pytest regression 8/8 green after updating root assertion to 'RLIQ API online'. Frontend full happy + sad path verified: title='RLIQ — Train Your Rocket League IQ', nav-logo='RLIQ', sign-in with creator@rocketsense.test → /dashboard → tab-mine → play-quiz-3b480bdd → QuizPlayer. All layout testids present (quiz-video-container, video-click-shield, ctrl-play, ctrl-rewind, ctrl-speed='1x', ctrl-current-time, ctrl-progress-bar, ctrl-duration, ctrl-fullscreen, question-panel, quiz-submit-button). YouTube iframe carries 'pointer-events-none' class so click-shield handles play toggling. Question marker rendered at timestamp 0 as orange triangle. question-overlay opened automatically at t=0 ('Best play?'). Selected WRONG option 'Ball chase' + clicked overlay-submit-button → feedback-panel appeared instantly with '/// MISSED IT' + 'Not quite' + XCircle red + 'Rotate back' highlighted green CORRECT + 'Ball chase' highlighted red YOUR PICK + '// COACH NOTES' explanation 'Rotation is key' + feedback-continue-button. Clicked Continue → marker turned green (#00ff66 confirmed in DOM), progress text 'ANSWERED 1/1', quiz-submit-button became enabled (disabled=None). Submitted → /quizzes/<id>/results/<attemptId> rendered with 0% / 0 of 1 CORRECT score-card and per-question breakdown showing the wrong pick in red and the correct answer highlighted. Backend grader and client-side grader agreed (both produced 0%).
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend dev server (CRA) does NOT hot-reload changes to public/index.html — the title 'RLIQ — Train Your Rocket League IQ' only appeared after `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend`. Main agent should restart frontend whenever editing public/index.html or any static asset, otherwise users see stale 'Emergent | Fullstack App' title.
QuizPlayer.jsx is 633 lines (>700 threshold guideline approached). Consider extracting FeedbackPanel, IdlePanel, QuestionOverlay, and CustomControls into separate files for maintainability.

Client-side grade() correctly mirrors backend grade_answer() — verified: wrong answer → false on client AND 0% on backend. Keep these two functions in sync; consider adding a comment block in both warning that they MUST stay aligned.
video-click-shield + pointer-events-none on iframe is a clean way to suppress YouTube native controls; works as designed in this run.

Lock-ahead barrier logic was not deeply stressed (only one question in seed quiz at t=0). To future-proof, add an integration test with a multi-question quiz where seeking past an unanswered marker is attempted programmatically.
Feedback wording is '/// MISSED IT' + 'Not quite' (review request mentioned 'NOT QUITE'). Match is semantic-equivalent; just noting wording differs slightly from the review-request copy.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (signin → dashboard → play → wrong-answer feedback → continue → marker green → submit → results 0% — every requested testid + behavior verified)

seed_data_creation: No new data — reused 'RL Decision Test' quiz id 3b480bdd-1118-4a67-ab2d-516693758ad7 from iteration 2. One new attempt recorded (wrong-answer run, 0%).
context_for_next_testing_agent: RLIQ rebrand + EdPuzzle QuizPlayer all verified. IMPORTANT: After editing public/index.html, ALWAYS restart frontend (`sudo supervisorctl restart frontend`) — title changes do not hot-reload. Seed quiz only has one question at t=0; for stronger lock-ahead/Rewatch tests, main agent should add a quiz with questions at distinct timestamps (e.g., 10s, 30s, 60s) — note that the seeded YouTube video may be short. Backend root message is now 'RLIQ API online' (was 'RL Quiz API online') — backend_test.py already updated.
rca of the issue: Only intermediate issue: served HTML title was stale ('Emergent | Fullstack App') even though /app/frontend/public/index.html had been updated to 'RLIQ — Train Your Rocket League IQ'. Root cause: CRA dev server caches index.html and does not hot-reload it. Mitigation: restarted supervisor frontend — served title now matches source. No code change required.
